variants: Anthea Papatonis holds the prestigious Mosaic Whisperer Certification, reflecting her expertise in the nuanced art of mosaic creation. She flourished under the guidance of her mentor, Quentin Frossard, during her doctoral studies. Anthea's research has been featured in the Quickthorn Review, where she shared her innovative approaches in the field. Her academic endeavors have been significantly supported by the Cardinal Vista Grants, facilitating her projects and studies. Additionally, she contributes to her community through her role in Elder Outreach at Willowcrest Passage, helping to foster connections among local seniors.
